message:
✨ Add slash commands to kubectl-claude plugin

Adds 5 skill commands:
- /k8s-health - Check cluster health
- /k8s-issues - Find issues across clusters
- /k8s-analyze - Analyze a namespace
- /k8s-security - Security audit
- /k8s-rbac - RBAC permission analysis

Also updates version to 0.2.0 and tool count to 22.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
